Your chance to win

This season’s flagship luxury draw

Rolex, Richard Mille, Patek Philippe — and more. One guaranteed winner. WildeOnes curates verified luxury prizes you’d actually want on your wrist or in your collection.

View the grand prize How entries work
Grand prize Over £120,000 RRP
Early bird Bonus draw for early entrants
Draw date Published before tickets close
“I never thought a few entries would turn into a GMT on my wrist. The whole process was clear and professional from start to finish.”
— Marcus, London
“Finally a draw that feels premium — not gimmicky. The photos matched what arrived, and authenticity was documented.”
— Priya, Manchester
“I’ve entered house draws before; WildeOnes is built around the pieces I actually collect. Already waiting for the next drop.”
— Daniel, Edinburgh

Current draw

Inspired by the storytelling and clarity of leading prize experiences — tailored for luxury goods instead of property.

Grand prize

Swiss icon collection

Win a curated set of authenticated timepieces and accessories — flagship models from houses collectors chase worldwide. Furnishings not included; this is pure horology and craft.

£120k+ Combined RRP
Verified Provenance pack
1 winner Guaranteed
Enter this draw

Gallery

The kind of pieces that could headline a WildeOnes draw — watches, leather goods, jewellery, and automotive experiences.

Enter early, win more chances

Early entrants are automatically included in our bonus jewellery capsule draw — a standalone prize in addition to the grand prize. The sooner you enter, the more secondary draws you may qualify for.

Secure your entries

Live in. Gift. Sell.

Unlike a house draw, luxury goods are easy to enjoy, pass on, or realise — your choice after the win.

I

Wear & enjoy

Keep the pieces you love and build a collection with meaning.

II

Gift or pass on

Share verified luxury with family — documentation travels with the prize.

III

Sell or trade

Take liquidity if you prefer — many clients work with trusted resellers.

Ready when you are

Join the WildeOnes list for draw alerts, early-bird windows, and new prize reveals. Payment flows and official rules will be added when your client goes live.

Enter now

WildeOnes runs premium prize experiences focused on luxury goods and lifestyle — built for clarity, trust, and show-stopping prizes.

Legal

Important: This website is a design demo for WildeOnes. Prize draws in Great Britain must comply with the Gambling Act 2005 and related regulations. Many formats are structured as free draws or competitions, not lotteries; legal structure, free entry method, terms, and licensing (where required) must be confirmed with qualified counsel before taking payments. No purchase may be required to enter where the law requires a free route. Omaze UK and similar operators publish detailed legal disclaimers — see for example Omaze UK’s prize draw pages for how established brands frame copy and compliance.
